calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Appointing Sole Successor Trustee Of The Trust
Off Calendar Oct-23-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

The following matters were heard: PTR-18-301845 The Charlotte Greenstone's Survivor's Trust and PTR-18-301846 The Trust for the Benefit of Charles Greenstone.

Appearances: Michael Demian for Michael Miller (Petitioner).
Geoffrey Dunham for Beneficiaries.

The Court noted that this is a request to appoint a sole Successor Trustee and to remove the Co-Trustee. Mr. Demian stated that the Co-Trustee is currently incapacitated due to a medical condition and that Mr. Miller is a nominated Trustee as well as other Co-Trustees who have resigned. In addition, Mr. Demian stated that there are around $200,000.00, that all that needs to be done is to distribute the assets and close out the estate, and that there is no need for Co-Trustees. Mr. Dunham stated that all of the Beneficiaries agree. The Court granted the Petitions for Order Appointing Sole Successor Trustee of the Trusts (subject to review of the orders).

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
